verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Sing hallelujah to the Lord, Sing hallelujah to the Lord; Sing hallelujah, Sing hallelujah Sing hallelujah to the Lord.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Jesus is risen from the dead, Jesus is risen from the dead; Jesus is risen, Jesus is risen, Jesus is risen from the dead.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Jesus is living in His church, Jesus is living in His church; Jesus is living, Jesus is living, Jesus is living in His church.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Jesus is Lord of heav’n and earth, Jesus is Lord of heav’n and earth, Jesus is Lord, Jesus is Lord, Jesus is Lord of heav’n and earth.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: He’s coming back to claim His own, He’s coming back to claim His own, He’s coming back, He’s coming back He’s coming back to claim His own.
